AddNewOneToManyEndpointRelation - Class in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.toCollection.oneToMany

UnlinkManyToManyEndpointRelation - Class in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.toCollection.manyToMany

W

wantsAbstractController() - Method in record class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityRequirements
 
wantsAbstractRepository() - Method in record class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityRequirements
 
wantsAbstractService() - Method in record class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityRequirements
 
wantsController() - Method in record class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityRequirements
 
wantsFilter() - Method in class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityModel
 
wantsRepository() - Method in record class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityRequirements
 
wantsService() - Method in record class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.base.JpaEntityRequirements
 
warn(ProcessingEnvironment, Element, String) - Static method in class com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.utils.LoggingUtils
Prints a warning message.
WithEndpoints - Annotation Interface in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.annotation.endpoint
Configures generation of multiple endpoints for a collection association field.
WithGetEndpoint - Annotation Interface in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.annotation.endpoint
Indicates that the annotated method should be exposed as a GET endpoint.
WithJpaRepository - Annotation Interface in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.annotation
Triggers the generation of a Spring Data JPA repository for the annotated entity.
WithRestController - Annotation Interface in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.annotation
Triggers the generation of a Spring REST controller and JPA repository for the annotated entity.
WithService - Annotation Interface in com.kivojenko.spring.forge.annotation
Triggers the generation of a service class and JPA repository for the annotated entity.
A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P Q R S T U V W 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
